The relevant part is: "A number of history experts say that there is no record of who actually wrote the 'Happy Birthday to You' lyrics. Historians also say there is no way to know when the general public began singing the 'Happy Birthday' song, but they believe it was being sung by the public long before it was printed and owned by a company."
